data.title: The iGarden X Series Swim Jet wins CES 2026 Innovation Award, turning any pool into lap pool/lazy river without renovations.
data.description: In San Francisco, the iGarden X Series Swim Jet has received the prestigious CES 2026 Innovation Award for its innovative portable propulsion system. This technology can transform any backyard pool into a top-tier lap pool or a leisurely lazy river without requiring renovations or construction. With the growing interest in maximizing existing spaces, the iGarden X Series offers a convenient plug-and-play solution for pool fitness. Homeowners can enjoy the benefits of a high-performance pool without the need for expensive construction or permanent "endless pool" installations.

data.title: Barco Products expands Mason Collection with tables, benches, waste receptacles, and patio furniture for modern outdoor solutions.
data.description: In Batavia, Illinois, Barco Products is pleased to announce a significant expansion of its popular Mason Collection due to the success of its Mason Recycled Plastic Tables. The expanded line now includes benches, tree-hugger benches, waste receptacles, and a full range of patio furniture. Launched in May 2024, the Mason Tables garnered immense popularity among customers. The collection emphasizes modern design, sustainable materials, and long-lasting performance. The expansion reflects the company's commitment to offering environmentally friendly and stylish outdoor furniture options.

data.title: Fibra Macquarie México reports strong Q4 2025 results: Industrial portfolio up 6.7%, Retail closing occupancy at 94.1%, cash distribution of Ps. 0.6125 per certificate declared.
data.description: In Mexico City, FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) (BMV: FIBRAMQ12) released its financial and operational results for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. Key highlights from the fourth quarter of 2025 include a strong performance in the same store Net Operating Income (NOI) portfolio, with a 6.7% increase in the Industrial portfolio (measured in US Dollars, Year-over-Year). Additionally, the Industrial portfolio saw a 0.9% quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) increase in leased Gross Leasable Area (GLA) and a 0.3% year-over-year (YoY) increase. The Retail portfolio reported a closing occupancy rate of 94.1%, marking a 48 basis point (bps) increase QoQ and a 75 bps increase YoY. For the fourth quarter of 2025, a cash distribution of Ps. 0.6125 per certificate was declared.

data.title: XFLH Capital Corporation closes $100 Million IPO issuing 10,000,000 units at $10 each.
data.description: In New York City on February 13, 2026, XFLH Capital Corporation, a Cayman Islands exempt company, shared news about the completion of its initial public offering. The company successfully closed the offering by selling 10,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit.

data.title: "BrainTap Sports launched in New Bern, N.C., aims to boost performance with neuroscience training for athletes. Feb. 13, 2026"
data.description: A press briefing recently introduced the launch of BrainTap Sports, a cutting-edge training program designed to enhance focus, speed up recovery, and redefine the competitive advantage. Taking place in New Bern, North Carolina on February 13, 2026, the official unveiling featured a live event on February 6, showcasing BrainTap's innovative approach to sports performance. This neuroscience-driven initiative aims to revolutionize training techniques, leveraging the latest advancements to optimize athletic potential. The program offers athletes a unique opportunity to hone their mental acuity and physical prowess, ultimately transforming their approach to competition.

data.title: Bitcoin aims to hit $70,000, along with Ethereum and XRP seeing gains. $69,176.98 BTC, $2,060.75 ETH, $1.41 XRP. 94,874 traders liquidated for $294.61 million in 24 hours. Coinbase market share doubles.
data.description: Bitcoin has bounced back to nearly $70,000 despite fluctuating ETF flows and dominating "Extreme Fear" sentiment. Current cryptocurrency prices include Bitcoin at $69,176.98, Ethereum at $2,060.75, Solana at $84.93, XRP at $1.41, Dogecoin at $0.09626, and Shiba Inu at $0.056321. Recent data from Coinglass reveals that 94,874 traders faced liquidation in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses of $294.61 million. Meanwhile, top gainers in the same period were Humanity Protocol, pippin, and Kite. Noteworthy news mentions Coinbase's doubled market share and an analyst's belief in its enhanced diversification. Additionally, a statement declares no bailouts for Bitcoin. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AMD gaining market share from Intel in PC and server processors as per a Wall Street analyst. AMD stock rose.
data.description: According to a recent report by a Wall Street analyst, AMD is steadily increasing its market share in PC and server processors at the expense of Intel. This growth has resulted in a rise in AMD's stock value on Friday. This development underscores AMD's success in capturing a larger portion of the market, with significant implications for the overall industry landscape.

data.title: Clear Street Group delays IPO due to market conditions amidst software sell-off, spooking investors.
data.description: Clear Street Group has reportedly delayed its initial public offering due to market conditions. The postponement was triggered by the software sector experiencing a sell-off, which has made investors apprehensive.

data.title: Safran, GE Aerospace's partner, projects 10% growth for the next 2 years, with positive outlook for 2026 and beyond.
data.description: Safran, a partner of GE Aerospace, has revised its future outlook, projecting a 10% increase in growth for the next two years. This adjustment in guidance signals optimistic prospects for the company moving into 2026 and beyond. The positive development has led to a rise in Safran's stock performance as investors react to the news. This update was first reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Stock market breaks key levels as Nasdaq and S&P 500 fall below 50-day lines amid AI disruption fears. (Character count: 95)
data.description: At the beginning of the week, the stock market showed strength, but the Nasdaq and S&P 500 experienced declines below their 50-day moving averages due to concerns about disruptive effects of artificial intelligence (AI). This caused a division in the market. The focus is now on companies such as Cisco, AppLovin, Arista, and Vertiv. This information was outlined in the weekly review report on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing receives new buy rating as stock reaches record high; analysts optimistic about further increase.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing has reached a historic high in trading, with a Wall Street analyst estimating that TSM stock has the potential for further increase. The company has gained significant traction, capturing the attention of investors and analysts alike. The latest reports indicate a positive outlook for TSM stock, reflecting the ongoing momentum, with industry experts signaling potential for additional growth. It is a noteworthy development as TSM continues to make strides in the market, with the current focus on its remarkable performance. This latest analysis is a testament to the company's robust standing, with experts predicting a favorable trajectory for TSM stock amidst its record-breaking performance.

data.title: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute opens new 31,000 sq-ft location in St. Petersburg, offering advanced cancer treatments and on-site imaging. Collaboration with Orlando Health.
data.description: Orlando Health has partnered with Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS) to make advanced cancer treatments more accessible through a new 31,000 square-foot facility in Fort Myers, Florida. The collaboration aims to provide on-site imaging services and innovative therapies for patients. The expansion signifies a significant step towards offering comprehensive care for cancer patients, with the facility serving as a hub for hospital-specialty collaboration. This development, initiated on February 13, 2026, showcases a commitment to enhancing healthcare services in the region.

data.title: Park Place Dealerships breaks ground on new Porsche dealership & expands Volvo store in Dallas with 15-acre investment. #luxuryauto
data.description: Park Place Dealerships, under Asbury Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE: ABG), commenced construction on a new Porsche dealership and an upgraded Volvo facility in Dallas. The endeavor signifies a substantial commitment to enhancing customer experience and the luxury automotive retail landscape in North Texas. Acquiring 15 acres in December 2024, Park Place Dealerships aims to finalize the construction of a cutting-edge Porsche dealership by 2027 alongside expanding the existing Volvo facility on Lemmon Avenue.

data.title: TYM North America celebrates 75th Diamond Anniversary with new high-horsepower compact utility tractors and national sponsorship.
data.description: In Atlanta, on February 13, 2026, TYM North America has announced the release of a new lineup of high-horsepower compact utility tractors as part of their celebration of 75 years in business. The company has also revealed a national sponsorship initiative to mark this milestone. For more information, visit the interactive Multichannel News Release regarding this news.

data.title: Blue Diamond Growers launches new Blue Diamond Almondmilk line from California with 4 varieties.
data.description: Blue Diamond Growers, a grower-owned cooperative with over 100 years of experience in almond cultivation, has introduced a new almond milk. The product, named Blue Diamond Almondmilk, is now available in four different varieties. The launch took place on February 13, 2026, in Sacramento, California. The company is known for its expertise in almonds and is venturing into the alternative milk market.
